name: list-box-item
visual_summary: A list box item is a component used within a list, typically representing an item with visual indication of its selected or focused state. This component would be used when displaying a collection of items, allowing users to select or interact with them.
generation_prompt:

- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types
